messages.content:

definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

message.content: This section lists four video game entities under the "Role-playing" (角色扮演) category: 不休旅途绘卷世界, 明日方舟, 伊瑟, and 少女前线2：追放. It can answer questions regarding which specific titles are classified as role-playing games in this document. The content consists solely of a category heading and entity names, containing no dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
